title: reigera maritima
intro: Reigera maritima, also known as sea heath or sea heathwort, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the coastal areas of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Reigera maritima include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce congestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Reigera maritima can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
